name: @chief-clancy/dev
description: Autonomous Ralph Wiggum execution surface for Claude Code — pick up tickets and execute them with judgment
author: Alex Clapperton

scripts.build: rm -rf dist .declarations tsconfig.build.tsbuildinfo && tsc -p tsconfig.declarations.json && cp -r .declarations/dev/src/ dist/ && rm -rf .declarations && pnpm --filter @chief-clancy/core build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc-alias -p tsconfig.build.json
